summary: Iteration 81 - Complete testing of new backend features: Client Contact API, Financial Plan Generation, Fathom Integration, Knowledge Graph AI, Graph Actions Execution. All 21 backend tests passed. Frontend integrations verified: Contact form sends messages, Generate Plan creates financial plans, Quick Actions now properly connected to backend.

minor.issue: AI Q&A may return fallback answers when LLM unavailable - this is expected behavior with graceful degradation

critical_code_review_comments: Client Contact API (client_contact.py): Well-implemented messaging system with in-memory storage, proper response models, message threading support
Financial Plan API (financial_plan.py): Comprehensive plan generation with projections, tax analysis, risk assessment, and AI-powered executive summary
Fathom Integration (fathom_integration.py): Mock mode when no API key set - properly documented and functional
Knowledge Graph AI (ai_engine.py): LLM integration with emergentintegrations library, graceful fallback to structured answers
Graph Actions (routes.py): Adjust & execute creates proper transaction records linked to actions
FIXED: Client360View.jsx Quick Actions buttons were missing onClick handlers - now connected to handleQuickAction
FIXED: Client360View.jsx and TransactionModeler.jsx were missing axios import - added import statement
All APIs use proper REST conventions, consistent response structures, and error handling
seed_data_creation: None - APIs use in-memory storage (MESSAGES_STORE, GENERATED_PLANS, MEETINGS_STORE)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 81 verified all new features. Client Contact API creates messages with MSG-* IDs and status=delivered. Financial Plan API generates comprehensive plans with PLAN-* IDs including projections, tax analysis, risk assessment. Fathom uses MOCK data when FATHOM_API_KEY not set. Knowledge Graph AI returns natural language answers (or structured fallback). Graph Actions create transaction records when executed. Frontend fixes applied: axios import added, Quick Actions onClick handlers connected.

endpoints_tested: POST /api/client-contact/send-message - creates message with ID and status=delivered
POST /api/financial-plan/generate - returns plan with projections, tax_analysis, risk_assessment, executive_summary
GET /api/fathom/status - returns integration status with mock_mode=true
GET /api/fathom/meetings/{id}/summary - returns AI summary, key_topics, action_items
POST /api/graph/ai/ask - returns natural language answer (or structured fallback)
POST /api/graph/actions/{id}/adjust - executes and creates transaction record

features: Contact form sends message via POST /api/client-contact/send-message
Quick Actions (Schedule Meeting, Request Statement) now connected and working
Shows success toast with Plan ID, Projected Value, Annualized Return

mocked_apis.fathom_integration: MOCKED - No FATHOM_API_KEY set, uses demo meeting data (MTG-DEMO001)
mocked_apis.knowledge_graph: MOCKED - EmbeddedGraph class uses in-memory dictionaries with demo financial data

load_test_results.cgt_endpoint: Previously verified: 5,139 requests in 60s, 2ms avg response, 90 req/s throughput
